data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a 'Post-completion certificate' as part of the checklist system. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. The linked use case mentions the need for a post-completion certificate but does not provide any details on how it is generated or accessed, indicating a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or retrieval of a 'Post-completion certificate'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of the 'Post-completion certificate'.
